SignIn.title: Welcome to your personal Speaker Dossier
SignIn.description: Here you will find all the information you need about your appearance at our event.

SpeakerBriefing.title: Briefing for
SpeakerBriefing.badge-information: You will receive your personal access badge on site.
SpeakerBriefing.on-site-contact-text: You will receive personal assistance on site.
SpeakerBriefing.schedule-car-text: You have informed us that you will be arriving by car.
SpeakerBriefing.schedule-car-arrival: We look forward to seeing you at {time} in {venue}.
SpeakerBriefing.schedule-transfer-text: We will organize the transfer for you.
SpeakerBriefing.schedule-masking-information: Prior to your appearance, your speaker support will take you to the sound engineer (to attach the microphone).
SpeakerBriefing.schedule-session-end-text: You leave the stage after your performance. Please follow the instructions of the presenter and your speaker support staff.
SpeakerBriefing.schedule-attention: Please be there 10 min before your appearance for the mic check.
SpeakerBriefing.schedule-text: Please find all the important time slots for your performance below.
SpeakerBriefing.media-text: The entire conference will be recorded and the sessions will be available on demand for participants. Photos will be published on our website and the media will also have access to a selection of photos.
SpeakerBriefing.about-text: The Swiss startup days (SUD) are the leading deep-tech catalyst event where Switzerland’s innovation bridges are built. From mindset to connection to action, SUD empowers entrepreneurs, investors, corporates, and enablers to create a stronger, more connected, and more resilient startup ecosystem — all in a single day.
SpeakerBriefing.section-platform: How to access your profil on our registration platform:
SpeakerBriefing.plafrorm-text: You are already registered for the event on our platform. You can log in with your login data. Feel free to update your profile and book your sessions or 1:1 meetings.
SpeakerBriefing.platform-pwd-note: Please change your password after your first login
